title: Roll the Dice
description: Try your luck with new item - dice
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8043f89324d304d6df0425d857fd9ed07b8eb56e.png)

## Found bug / order datapack / other - [Discord](https://discord.gg/dCWyMsE94D).

### This datapack was intended to add dices and a bit more interactive for gambling.

You can craft dice using a bone block and black dye.

### Resource pack is not required! 

<details>
<summary>How to use the Dice</summary>

Dice will show the result either when it lands on the ground or when 10 seconds have passed after being thrown.

</details>
